transcript: Speaker A (Coaching classes): English karkkanuma? Admission pannunga. Fees pay pannunga. Appuram batch full aana udane class start aagum. [Want to learn English? Take admission. Pay fees. Then, once the batch is full, the class will start.] Speaker B (SpeakX): App download pannunga. One click-la practice panna start pannunga. [Download the app. Start practicing with one click.] Speaker A: Class time fixed-aa irukkum. Class miss pannakka notes vaangikko. Next class-ku wait pannunga. [Class time will be fixed. If you miss a class, get notes. Wait for the next class.] Speaker B: Ungalukku eppo venumo appo practice pannunga. 24/7 AI teacher irukkum. [Practice whenever you want. 24/7 AI teacher is available.] Speaker A: Ellaar munnaadi pesanum. Thappu pannaaka ellaarume sirippaanga. [You have to speak in front of everyone. If you make a mistake, everyone will laugh.] Speaker B: Ungalai yaarum judge panna maattaanga. Neenga private AI practice pannungalaam. [No one will judge you. You can practice privately with AI.] Speaker A: Neriya theory notes. Aana real conversation-ai neenga dhaan thaniya practice pannanum. [Lots of theory notes. But you have to practice real conversation on your own.] Speaker B: Interviews, daily situations, office meetings ellaam Sara AI-la practice pannunga. Neenga romba purinjavanga. Ippo neengale yosichu paarunga, edhai choose panna poringa? [Practice interviews, daily situations, office meetings, all with Sara AI. You are very smart. Now think for yourself, which one are you going to choose?]
on_screen_text: coaching classes, speakx, appuram batch full aana udane class start aagum [then once the batch is full, class will start], one click-la practice panna start pannunga [start practicing in one click], Class time fixed-aa irukkum... [Class time will be fixed...], Ungalukku eppo venumo appo practice pannunga... [Practice whenever you want...], Ellaar munnaadi pesanum... [Have to speak in front of everyone...], Yaarum judge panna maattaanga... [No one will judge...], nariya theory notes... [lots of theory notes...], aana real conversation-ai neenga dhaan thaniya practice pannanum [but you have to practice real conversation alone], Neenga romba purinjavanga... [You are very understanding...], ippo neengale yosichu paarunga edhai choose panna poringa? [now think for yourself, which one are you going to choose?], SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE DOWNLOAD NOW
summary: The ad compares traditional English coaching classes with the SpeakX app using a split-screen format. It highlights the limitations of coaching classes, such as fixed schedules and fear of judgment, while showcasing SpeakX's benefits like 24/7 AI practice and privacy. The video ends by asking viewers to choose the smarter option and download the app.
